sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, and GRA source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

cit.quote:
<L>24259<pc>2-0903<k1>ca<k2>ca<h>1
1. {#ca#}¦ <ab>enklit.</ab> <ab>Part.</ab>
<ls>ŚĀNT. 1,22.</ls> Die Personalpronomina erscheinen in den volleren, betonten Formen nach
<ls>P. 8,1,24.</ls>
<ls>VOP. 3,143.</ls> {#grAmastava ca svaM mama ca svam#}
<ls>P.</ls>, <ab>Sch.</ab> {#tuByaM mahyaM ca dadyAtsvam#}
<ls>VOP.</ls>
<div n="1"> 1) {%und, auch%},
<lang n="greek">τε</lang>, {%que%}; einzelne Theile des Satzes oder ganze Sätze aneinanderreihend. Scheint ursprünglich beiden zu verbindenden Wörtern und Satzgliedern nachgestellt worden zu sein und im
<ls>ṚV.</ls> ist das doppelt gesetzte {#ca#} noch häufiger als das einfache.
<div n="2"> a) {#ca — ca#}, — {%und, sowohl — als auch%}: {#a\haM ca\ tvaM ca^#}
<ls>ṚV. 8,51,11.</ls> {#mi\traSco\BA varu^RaSca#}
<ls n="ṚV.">5,68,2.</ls> {#a\mI ca\ ye ma\GavA^no va\yaM ca^#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,141,13.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">2,1,16.</ls> {#A ca\ parA^ ca#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,164,31.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">10,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">96,7.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">7,4,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 7,">22,9.</ls> {#daSa cAzwO ca#} {%achtzehn%}
<ls>M. 1,64.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,5,7.</ls> {#asapiRqA ca yA mAturasagotrA ca yA pituH#}
<ls>M. 3,5.</ls> {#AcCAdya cArcayitvA ca#}
<ls n="M. 3,">27.</ls> {#saMjIvayati cAjasraM pramApayati cAvyayaH#}
<ls n="M.">1,57.</ls> <ls>N. 3,21.</ls> <ls n="N.">8,9.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 58.</ls> <ls>HIT. I,11.</ls> <ls n="HIT. I,">112.</ls> <ls n="HIT. I,">164.</ls> <ls>RAGH. 1,16.</ls> <ls n="RAGH. 1,">68.</ls> {#kva ca te kzatriyabalaM kva ca brahmabalaM mahat#}
<ls>R. 1,56,4.</ls> <ls n="R.">3,13,24.</ls>
<ls>ŚĀK. 10.</ls> {#pUrvAhRe ca parAhRe ca talaM yasya na muYcati#} {%weder — noch%} <ab>Cit.</ab> beim
<ab>Sch.</ab> zu <ls>ŚĀK. 86.</ls> {#na (aSnIyAt) grAmajAtAnyArto 'pi mUlAni ca PalAni ca#}
<ls>M. 6,16.</ls> Das erste verbum <ab>fin.</ab> behält den Ton nach
<ls>P. 8,1,58.</ls> <ls n="P. 8,1,">59.</ls> <ls>WHITNEY</ls> in <ls>J. Am. Or. Soc. V,401.</ls> {#a\yama\smAnvana\spati\rmA ca\ hA mA ca^ rIrizat#}
<ls>ṚV. 3,53,20.</ls> {#na\ma\syantI\rupa^ ca\ yanti\ saM cA^ viSanti#}
<ls n="ṚV.">9,95,3.</ls>
<div n="2">— b) wird an erster Stelle weggelassen: {#ya\jYaM ha\viSca^#}
<ls>ṚV. 1,12,10.</ls> {#a\mfta\M martya^M ca#}
<ls n="ṚV. 1,">35,2.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">7,4.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">10,5.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">13,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">14,1.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">17,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">25,11.</ls> <ls n="ṚV. 1,">31,9.</ls> {#tejasA yaSasA lakzmyA sTityA ca parayA#}
<ls>N. 12,6.</ls> <ls n="N.">1,9.</ls> <ls n="N. 1,">10.</ls>
<ls>HIT. I,33.</ls> {#pAwavaM saMskftoktizu .. vAcAM sarvatra vEcitryaM nItividyAM dadAti ca#} (gehört zu {#nIti˚) ..#}
<ls>HIT. Pr. 2.</ls> {#nipetuste garutmantaH sA dadarSa ca tAngaRAn#}
<ls>N. 1,22.</ls> <ls n="N.">2,15.</ls> {#dAsAnAM Bujavegena nadyAH srotojalena ca . vAyunA cAnukUlena#}
<ls>HIḌ. 1,2.</ls> {#na — na ca#} {%weder — noch%}
<ls>N. 10,21.</ls>
<div n="2">— c) steht nur an erster Stelle: {#indra^Sca vAyo#}
<ls>ṚV. 4,47,2.</ls> {#indra^Sca soma#}
<ls n="ṚV.">7,104,25.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">4,50,10.</ls> {#a\gniSca^ soma#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,93,5.</ls>, {#iha cAmutra#}
<ls>M. 9,322.</ls> {#pretya ceha#}
<ls n="M.">3,20.</ls> {#durBedyaScASusaMDeyaH#}
<ls>HIT. I,86.</ls> {#na Kalu ca pariBoktuM nEva Saknomi hAtum#} {%weder — noch%}
<ls>ŚAK. 115.</ls>
<div n="2">— d) bei mehreren zu verbindenden Wörtern unregelmässig gesetzt: {#maDuparke ca yajYe ca pitfdEvatakarmaRi#} (fehlt zuletzt)
<ls>M. 5,41.</ls> {#karRO carma ca bAlAMSca vastiM snAyuM ca rocanAm#}
<ls n="M.">8,234.</ls> {#fRadAtA ca vEdyaSca SrotriyaH sujalA nadI#} ad
<ls>HIT. I,100.</ls> <ls n="HIT.">Pr. 26.</ls> <ls>N. 12,5.</ls>
<div n="2">— e) mit Weglassung desjenigen Wortes oder derjenigen
[Page2-0904]
Wörter, an welche angeknüpft wird: {#kamaRqalO ca karakaH#} {%hat (unter andern) auch die Bedeutung von%} {#ka˚#}
<ls>AK. 3,4,1,6.</ls> <ls n="AK. 3,4,1,">15.</ls> <ab>u. s. w.</ab>
<div n="2">— f) bisweilen müssig: {#Ije cApyaSvameDena yayAtiriva nAhuzaH . anyESca bahuBirDImAnkratuBiScAptadakziREH ..#}
<ls>N. 5,43.</ls>
<div n="2">— g) in <ab>Verbind.</ab> mit anderen Partikeln: {#cEva#} (in M. wohl 300 Mal): {#vEriRaM nopaseveta sahAyaM cEva vEriRaH#} {%weder — noch%}
<ls>M. 4,133.</ls> {#cEva — cEva#}
<ls>N. 22,29.</ls>
<ls>BRĀHMAṆ. 2,25.</ls> {#cEva — ca#}
<ls>N. 4,2.</ls> <ls n="N. 4,">20.</ls>
<ls>BRĀHMAṆ. 2,25.</ls> {#ca — cEva#}
<ls>N. 5,16.</ls> {#cEva hi#} (am Ende eines Halbverses)
<ls>M. 2,105.</ls> <ls n="M.">3,116.</ls> <ls n="M. 3,">207.</ls> <ls n="M. 3,">232.</ls> <ls n="M.">4,25.</ls> {#cApi#}
<ls>M. 1,14.</ls> <ls n="M.">3,179.</ls> {#ca — cApi#}
<ls>N. 10,16.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,4,8.</ls> {#cApi — ca#}
<ls>N. 5,45.</ls> {#api ca#} (<ab>vgl.</ab> <ab>u.</ab> {#api#} 2.
), {#na — na — api ca#} (ohne <ab>Neg.</ab>)
<ls>N. 1,13.</ls> {#saKyaM prItiM cApi na kArayet#} {%weder — noch%}
<ls>HIT. I,74.</ls> {#na — na cApi#}
<ls>HIT. I,15.</ls> {#api cEva#}
<ls>M. 1,105.</ls> {#cEvApi#}
<ls n="M.">4,6.</ls> <ls n="M.">8,128.</ls> {#ca taTA#}
<ls n="M.">6,62.</ls> <ls>INDR. 1,6.</ls> {#taTA ca#}
<ls>N. 4,8.</ls> {#taTEva ca#}
<ls>M. 7,150.</ls> <ls n="M. 7,">153.</ls> <ls n="M.">8,291.</ls> <ls n="M. 8,">292.</ls> <ls n="M.">9,291.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,3,13.</ls>
<div n="1">— 2) wechselt mit {#vA#} {%oder%} und vertritt dessen Stelle: {#iha cAmutra vA#}
<ls>M. 12,89.</ls> {#strI vA pumAnvA yaccAnyatsattvaM nagararAzwrajam#}
<ls>R. 1,9,21.</ls> {#na te BayaM naravyAGra daMzwriByaH Satruto 'pi vA . brahmarziByaSca BavitA#}
<ls>N. 14,18.</ls> {#asyAraRyasya devI tvamutAho 'sya mahIBftaH . asyASca nadyAH#}
<ls n="N.">12,53.</ls>
<div n="1">— 3) {%auch, selbst, sogar%}: {#kasya biByati devASca#}
<ls>R. 1,1,4.</ls> {#sucintitaM cOzaDamAturARAM na nAmamAtreRa karotyarogam#}
<ls>HIT. I,162.</ls> {#yAni kAni ca mitrARi kartavyARi SatAni ca#} ad
<ls n="HIT.">17,3.</ls> <ls>ŚĀK. 6,5.</ls> {#rahitA BartfBiScEva na kruDyanti kadA ca na#}
<ls>N. 18,9.</ls>
<div n="1">— 4) {%und zwar%}: {#Druvamatra jalasTAnaM mahacceti matirmama#}
<ls>HIḌ. 1,26.</ls> {#AnezyAmo vayaM taM ca na ca dozo Bavizyati#}
<ls>R. 1,8,21.</ls>
<div n="1">— 5) = {#eva#} {%gerade, eben%}: {#te tu yAvanta evAjO tAvAMSca dadfSe sa tEH#}
<ls>RAGH. 12,45.</ls> <ab>Vgl.</ab> den
<ab>Sch.</ab> zu <ls>P. 2,1,17.</ls> <ls n="P. 2,1,">72</ls>, der das {#ca#} bei <ls>P.</ls> so auffasst.
<div n="1">— 6) verbindet Gegensätze,
<div n="3"> α) {%aber, dagegen%}: {#mUrKo 'pi SoBate tAvatsaBAyAM vastravezwitaH . tAvacca SoBate mUrKo yAvatkiMcinna BAzate ..#}
<ls>HIT. Pr. 39.</ls> <ls n="HIT.">I,33.</ls> <ls n="HIT. I,">50.</ls> {#kalinA tatkftaM karma tvaM ca mUQa na buDyase#}
<ls>N. 26,21.</ls> {#pitA yasya tu vfttaH syAjjIveccApi pitAmahaH#}
<ls>M. 3,221.</ls> {#yadi ca#}
<ls>N. 9,35.</ls> {#aTa ca#} <ab>v. l.</ab> für {#aTa tu#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 123.</ls> {#aTa vA ca#}
<ls>MBH. 12,7328.</ls> {#varamAdyO na cAntimaH#}
<ls>HIT. Pr. 12.</ls> <ls n="HIT. Pr.">16.</ls>
<ls>N. 3,16.</ls>
<div n="3">— β) {%dennoch%}: {#SAntamidamASramapadaM sPurati ca bAhuH#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 15.</ls> {#kAmAtmatA na praSastA na cEvehAstyakAmatA#}
<ls>M. 2,2.</ls> {#apanetuM ca yatito na cEva Sakito mayA#}
<ls>HIḌ. 4,33.</ls> {#prajAkAmaH sa cAprajaH#}
<ls>N. 1,5.</ls> <ls n="N. 1,">28.</ls> <ls n="N.">9,4.</ls> <ls n="N.">21,29.</ls>
<ls>R. 1,1,36.</ls>
<ls>VID. 25.</ls>
<div n="1">— 7) {#ca — ca#}
[Page2-0905]
{%kaum — so%}, den unmittelbaren Zusammenhang zweier Ereignisse hervorhebend: {#te ca prApurudanvantaM bubuDe cAdipUruzaH#}
<ls>RAGH. 10,6.</ls> <ls n="RAGH.">3,40.</ls>
<ls>KUMĀRAS. 3,58.</ls> <ls n="KUMĀRAS. 3,">66.</ls>
<ls>ŚĀK. 126.</ls> <ls n="ŚĀK.">135.</ls> in {#iti ca SastraM saMDatte#}
<ls>ŚĀK. 94,13</ls> scheint {#ca#} gleichfalls anzudeuten, dass der König den Pfeil {%unmittelbar%}, nachdem er gesprochen, auflege; <ab>vgl.</ab> auch: {#tasyAScetprasaro datto dAsyaM ca#} ({%sogleich%}) {#Sirasi sTitam#}
<ls>HIT. I,178.</ls> {#yastarizyati paScAcca#} ({%unmittelbar darauf%}) {#so 'syA BartA Bavizyati#}
<ls>VID. 199.</ls>
<div n="1">— 8) = {#ced#} {%wenn%}
<ls>P. 8,1,30</ls> (durch {#caR#} vom andern {#ca#} unterschieden).
<ls>WHITNEY</ls> in <ls>J. Am. Or. Soc. V,395.</ls> {#hiMste\ ada^ttA\ puru^zaM yAci\tAM ca\ na ditsa^ti#}
<ls>AV. 12,4,13.</ls> {#na ca^ pratyAha\nyAnmana^sA tvA pra\tyAha\nmIti^ pra\tyAha^nyAt#}
<ls n="AV.">8,10,31.</ls> <ls n="AV.">11,3,28.</ls> <ls n="AV. 11,3,">29.</ls> {#indra^Sca mf\LayA^ti no\ na na^H pa\ScAda\GaM na^Sat#}
<ls>ṚV. 2,41,11.</ls> {#tvaM ca^ soma no\ vaSo^ jI\vAtu\M na ma^rAmahe#}
<ls n="ṚV.">1,91,6.</ls> <ls n="ṚV.">3,43,4.</ls> {#jIvituM cecCase mUQa hetuM me gadataH SfRu#}
<ls>DRAUP. 9,10.</ls> {#loBaScAsti guRena kiM piSunatA yadyasti kiM pAtakEH#}
<ls>BHARTṚ. 2,45.</ls>
<div n="1">— 9) über die <ab>Bed.</ab> von {#ca#} nach einem <ab>pron.</ab> <ab>interr.</ab> <ab>s. u.</ab> {#ka, kaTA#} <ab>u. s. w.</ab> Eine verallgemeinernde <ab>Bed.</ab> hat {#ca#}, wie es scheint, auch nach dem <ab>pron.</ab> <ab>relat.</ab>: {#ye ca — tezAm#} {%alle welche%}
<ls>N. 20,29.</ls> — Die Lexicographen kennen folgende <ab>Bedd.</ab>: {#anvAcaya, samAhAra, itaretara (anyo'nyArTa), samuccaya#}
<ls>AK. 3,4,32,2.</ls>
<ls>H. an. 7,8.</ls>
<ls>MED. avy. 13.</ls> {#viniScaya = avaDAraRa = avaDfti#} (so <ab>st.</ab> {#avaDUti#} zu lesen
<ls>H. an.</ls>) <ls>AK. 3,5,15</ls>, <ab>v. l.</ab> <ls>TRIK. 3,3,465.</ls> <ls>H. an.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> {#pAdapUraRa#}
<ls>AK. 3,5,5.</ls>
<ls>TRIK.</ls>
<ls>H. an.</ls>
<ls>MED.</ls> {#pakzAntara#}
<ls>TRIK.</ls> <ls>H. an.</ls> <ls>MED.</ls> {#hetu#}
<ls>TRIK.</ls> <ls>H. an.</ls> {#tulyayogitA#} und {#viniyoga#}
<ls>H. an.</ls> — {#cana#} <ab>s.</ab> <ab>bes.</ab>
<LEND>

<L>38180<pc>2-202-c<k1>ca<k2>ca<h>1 <hom>1.</hom> {#ca#}¦ <ab>Conj.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 {%und, auch, <gk>τε</gk>, que%}. Steht hinter beiden zu verbindenden Theilen (oft durch {%sowohl — als auch%} wiederzugeben), nur nach dem letzten oder nur nach dem ersten. Bei drei und mehr zu verbindenden Theilen überall, nur nach dem letzten oder hier und da. In gebundener Rede steht {#ca#} {%bisweilen an unrichtiger Stelle%} ({#vEcitryaM nItividyAM dadAti ca#} <ab>st.</ab> {#ca da˚#}) und auch müssig. Werden zwei Sätze durch wiederholtes {#ca#} verbunden, so hat das erste Verbum finitum den Ton. {#ca — ca#} in einem negativen Satze {%weder -noch;%} {#na Kalu ca — nEva#} <ab>dass.</ab> Grammatiker, Lexicographen und Erklärer gebrauchen {#ca#} oft elliptisch ({%auch%} so <ab>v. a.</ab> {%dieses und noch Anderes%}). In Verbindung mit andern Partikeln; {#cEva#}, {#cEva — cEva#}, {#cEva — ca#}, {#ca — cEva#}, {#cEva hi#} (am Ende eines Halbverses), {#cApi#}, {#ca — cApi#}, {#cApi — ca#}, {#api ca#}, {#na — na — api ca#} (mit fehlender Negation), {#na — na cApi#}, {#api cEva#}, {#cEvApi#}, {#ca taTA#}, {#taTA ca#}, {#taTEva ca#}. <div n="1">— 2〉 {#ca — tu#} = {#ca — ca#} {%sowohl — als auch%} <ls n="Chr.">110,13</ls>. <div n="1">— 3〉 {%oder,%} mit {#vA#} wechselnd oder dessen Stelle vertretend (nach {#utAho#}). <div n="1">— 4〉 {%auch, selbst, sogar%}. <div n="1">— 5〉 {%und zwar%}. <div n="1">— 6〉 {%gerade, eben%} (ausnahmsweise). <div n="1">— 7〉 {%aber, dagegen%} <ls n="Chr.">43,18</ls>. <ab>Insbes.</ab> nach {#yadi, aTa#} [Page2-203-a] (hier <ab>v. l.</ab> {#tu#}), {#aTa vA#}. {#na cEva — tu#} {%nicht aber%} <ls n="Chr.">193,28</ls>. <div n="1">— 8〉 {%dennoch%}. <div n="1">— 9〉 {#ca — ca#} {%kaum%}. — so ein {#ca#} an zweiter Stelle ohne ein vorangehendes {#ca#} {%alsbald, sogleich%}. <div n="1">— 10〉 {#ca — ca#} {%obgleich — dennoch%} <ls>VIKR. 28</ls>. {#ca — na tu#} und {#ca — na ca#} {%obgleich-dennoch nicht%}. {#na ca — ca#} {%obgleich nicht — so doch%}. <div n="1">— 11〉 {%wenn%} (mit betontem Verbum <ab>fin.</ab>) <ls>VIKR. 39</ls>. <div n="1">— 12〉 über die <ab>Bed.</ab> von {#ca#} nach einem Interrogativum <ab>s. u.</ab> <hom>1.</hom> {#ka#} 2〉a〉, <hom>1.</hom> {#kaTA#} 1〉, {#kim#} 2〉d〉ϑ〉, {#kutra#} 7〉 und {#kva#} 5〉b〉. <LEND>

<L>12986<pc>0479-1<k1>ca<k2>ca {#ca#}¦ {%<ab>a.</ab>%} {@1@} Seedless. {@--2@} Bad, vile. {#--caH#} {@1@} An epithet of Śiva. {@--2@} <lbinfo n="Chew+ing"/> Chewing, eating. {@--3@} The moon. {@--4@} A tortoise. {@--5@} A thief. {%--<ab>ind.</ab>%} A <lbinfo n="parti+cle"/> particle expressing {@1@} Copulation (and, also as well as, moreover) used to join words or assertions together; (in this sense it is used with each [Page0479-2b+ 8] of the words or assertions which it joins together; or it is used after the last of the words or <lbinfo n="as+sertions"/> assertions so joined, but it never stands first in a sentence): {#mano#} <lbinfo n="ni#zWASUnyaM"/> {#nizWASUnyaM Bramati ca kimapyAliKati ca#} <lbinfo n="ls:Māl.+ 1. 31"/> <ls>Māl. 1. 31</ls>; {#tO gururgurupatnI ca prItyA#} <lbinfo n="pratina#naMdatuH"/> {#pratinanaMdatuH#} <ls>R. 1. 57</ls>; <ls>Ms. 1. 64</ls>; <ls n="Ms.">3. 5</ls>; [Page0479-2c+ 8] {#kulena kAMtyA vayasA navena guRESca#} <lbinfo n="tEstErvi#nayapraDAnEH"/> {#tEstErvinayapraDAnEH#} <ls>R. 6. 79</ls>; <ls>Ms. 1. 105</ls>; <lbinfo n="ls:3.+116"/> <ls n="Ms.">3. 116.</ls> {@--2@} Disjunction (but, still, yet); {#SAMtamidamASramapadaM raPurati ca bAhuH#} <lbinfo n="ls:Ś. 1.+ 16."/> <ls>Ś. 1. 16.</ls> {@--3@} Certainty, determination, (indeed, certainly, exactly, quite, having the force of {#eva#}); {#atItaH#} <lbinfo n="paM#TAnaM"/> {#paMTAnaM tava ca mahimA vANmanasayoH#} <ls>G. M.</ls>; [Page0480-a+ 57] {#te tu yAvaMta evAjO tAvAMSca dadfSe sa tEH#} <lbinfo n="ls:R.+ 12. 45."/> <ls>R. 12. 45.</ls> {@--4@} Condition (if = {#cet#}); <lbinfo n="jI#vituM"/> {#jIvituM cecCase#} (= {#icCase ced#}) {#mUQa hetuM me#} {#gadataH SfRu#} <ls>Mb.</ls>; {#loBaScAsti (asti ced)#} {#guRena kiM#} <ls>Bh. 2. 45</ls> <ab>v. l.</ab> {@--5@} It is often used expletively ({#pAdapUraRArTe#}); {#BImaH pArTastaTEva ca#} <ls>G. M.</ls> <lbinfo n="(Lexico+graphers"/> (Lexicographers give, besides the above, the following senses of {#ca#} which are included in the general idea of <lbinfo n="co+pulation"/> {%copulation%}; {@1@} {#anvAcaya#} joining a <lbinfo n="sub+ordinate"/> subordinate fact with a principal one; {#Bo BikzAmawa gAM cAnaya#}; see {#anvAcaya#}. {@--2@} {#samAhAra#} collective combination; as {#pARI ca pAdO ca pARipAdaM#}. {@--2@} <lbinfo n="itaMrata#rayoga"/> {#itaMratarayoga#} or mutual connection; as {#plakzaSca#} {#nyagroDaSca plakzanyagroDO#}. {@--4@} {#samuccaya#} <lbinfo n="aggre+gation"/> aggregation; as {#pacati ca paWati ca#}). {#ca#} is frequently repeated with two <lbinfo n="as+sertions"/> assertions (1) in the sense of ‘on the one hand-on the other hand’, ‘though-yet’, to denote antithesis; {#na sulaBA sakaleMdumuKI ca sA kimapi#} <lbinfo n="ceda#manaMgavicezwitaM"/> {#cedamanaMgavicezwitaM#} <ls>V. 2. 9</ls>; <ls n="V.">4. 3</ls>; <lbinfo n="ls:R. 16.+ 7"/> <ls>R. 16. 7</ls>; or (2) to express simultaneous or undelayed occurrence of two events (no sooner than, as soon as); {#te ca prApurudanvaMtaM bubuDe#} <lbinfo n="cAdipUru#zaH"/> {#cAdipUruzaH#} <ls>R. 10. 6</ls>; <ls n="R.">3. 40</ls>; <ls n="R.">11. 50</ls>, <ls n="R. 11.">81</ls>; <ls>Ku. 3. 58</ls>, <ls n="Ku. 3.">66</ls>; <ls>Ś. 6. 7</ls>; <ls>Māl. 9. 39.</ls> <LEND>

<L>3184<pc>0427<k1>ca<k2>ca {@ca@}¦ [<lang>gr.</lang> <gk>τε</gk>, <ls>Cu. 〔647〕</ls>], sehr selten (<ab>z. B.</ab> {77,2}) metrisch verlängert, stets hinter einem betonten Worte (anders {42,9}), und zwar hinter dem ersten Worte des dadurch angefügten Satzgliedes, selten hinter dem zweiten (práyas ā́ {31,7}; prá yaṃsi {42,9}; uśíjas yé {60,2}; ojāyámānas tanúas {140,6}; devā́sas dadhiré {26,8}; prá asmā́kāsas {97,3}): {%und, sowol — als auch,%} selten {%wenn%}. Bis zum _{141,1}. Liede sind alle Stellen, von da an nur einige, angeführt. <div n="P">I. {%und,%} dem letzten Gliede eingefügt, und zwar 1〉 zwei Nomen (Pronomen) oder Adverbien verknüpfend: {2,7}; {7,4}; {10,5}; {12,10}; {13,6}; {18,5}; {22,13}; {26,5}; {28,3}; {31,9}. _{31,12}; {33,7}; {34,3}; {35,2}; {47,10}; {50,11}; {54,8}; {62,3}; {70,6}; {73,8}. _{73,10}; {74,1}; {80,14}; {86,4}; {88,4}; {94,14}; {96,2}; {100,1}. _{100,15}. _{100,18}; {102,10}; {103,7}; {109,6}; {112,6}; {115,1}; {116,11}; {117,18} (śatám ékam ca); {120,12}; {123,13}; {124,12}; {136,7}; {139,3}; {140,13} (dyā́vākṣā́mā síndhavas ca); so auch bei zwei Vocativen, von denen der mit ca verknüpfte die Form des Nominativs annimmt: {2,5}. _{2,6}; {93,5}; {135,4}. _{135,7}; so auch 2〉 bei mehr als zwei Gliedern hinter den letzten: {97,2}; {136,2}; 3〉 zwei Verben verknüpfend, und zwar hinter das (einfache) Verb gestellt, welches dann betont wird: {13,1}; {14,1}; {31,17}; {48,3}; [Page428] {71,8} {103,2}; {129,1}; {132,4}; bei Verben, zu denen ein Richtungswort gehört, hinter dieses: {15,9}; {17,6}; {102,7} (<ab>erg.</ab> ririce); doch abweichend hinter prá yaṃsi ca {42,9} (<ab>s. o.</ab>); 4〉 zwei Sätze verknüpfend und nicht hinter das Verb oder sein Richtungswort gestellt: {25,19}; {34,12}; {57,5}; {84,5}. _{84,20}(?); {140,6}; {112,24}; insbesondere zwei Relativsätze verknüpfend und hinter das Relativ gestellt: {101,6}; {113,10}; 5〉 zwei nicht genau entsprechende Glieder verknüpfend: {8,5}; {23,21}; {31,7}; {70,7}; {80,13}; {97,3}; {127,8}; {128,5}; namentlich, indem dem Nomen des ersten Gliedes ein Relativsatz des zweiten entspricht: {25,11}; {51,8}; {60,2} (<ab>s. o.</ab>); {77,4}; {139,8}. <div n="P">II. {%und,%} dem ersten Gliede eingefügt, wobei das (einfache) Verb, wenn es diesem Gliede selbst angehört, betont wird: 1〉 zwei Nomen verknüpfend {32,15}; {73,7} (náktā ca uṣásā); namentlich zwei Vocativen, von denen der erste (índras) in Nominativform steht (<ab n="siehe">s.</ab> I. 1) {343,2}; {346,10}; {620,25}; 2〉 zwei Sätze verknüpfend (mit Betonung des ersten Verbs, <ab>s. o.</ab>) {77,2}; {114,6}. <div n="P">III. {%und, sowol — als auch,%} jedem der verknüpften Glieder eingefügt, bei mehr als zwei Gliedern auch einmal (im mittlern Gliede) ausgelassen; selten das zweite ca durch ein anderes Bindewort (utá) vertreten. Das dem ersten (oder bei drei Gliedern den beiden ersten) angehörende Verb ist stets betont. Namentlich wird es in dieser Bedeutung gebraucht 1〉 wenn die zwei Glieder Nomen (Pronomen) oder Adverbien sind: {10,4}; {23,20}; {24,1}. _{24,2}; {25,20}; {27,3}; {32,13}. _{32,14} (náva ca navatím ca); {37,6}; {61,14} (giráyas ca dyā́vā ca bhū́mā, wo dyā́vā bhū́mā nur einen Begriff ausmachen); {72,6}; {73,7} (kṛṣṇám ca várnam aruṇám ca) {84,2}; {92,13}; {96,1}. _{96,7}; {102,1}; {114,2}; {116,18}; {117,10}; {124,13}; {125,4}; {192,16}; {164,31} (ā́ ca párā ca pathíbhis cárantam); {422,2} (mitrás ca‿ubhā́ váruṇas ca); {520,5}; {671,11}; 2〉 oder das erste Glied oder beide Relativsätze: {141,13}; {140,12}; {538,9}; 3〉 oder zwei Hauptsätze: {35,11}; {76,4} (ā́ ca huvé ní ca satsi); {114,10} (mṛdā́ ca nas ádhi ca brūhi deva; das folgende Glied ádhā ca nas <ab>u. s. w.</ab> steht dem aus jenen beiden gebildeten Ganzen parallel); {120,9}; {287,20} (mā́ ca hā́s mā́ ca rīriṣat); {123,12} (párā ca yánti púnar ā́ ca yanti); {475,1} (sám ca tvé jagmús gíras indra pūrvī́s ví ca tvát yanti vibhúas manīṣā́s); so auch, wenn der zweite Satz unvollständig ist: {120,4} (pātám ca sáhyasas yuvám ca rábhyasas nas); 4〉 oder drei Hauptsätze: {54,11} (rákṣā ca nas maghónas, pāhí sūrī́n, rāyé ca nas suapatyaí iṣé dhās, wo der Deutlichkeit wegen die Sätze durch Kommata getrennt sind); {807,3} (namasyántīs úpa ca yánti, sám ca, ā́ ca viśanti uśatis uśántam); 5〉 ca-utá {94,5} dvipád ca, yád utá cátuṣpad. <div n="P">IV. {%wenn,%} stets mit betontem Verb (<ab>vgl.</ab> ca‿íd = céd): {74,6} (der Nachsatz in <ab n="Vers">V.</ab> _{74,7}); {91,6} (tuám ca soma nas váśas, jīvā́tum ná [Page429] marāmahe); {232,11} (índras ca mṛḍáyāti nas, ná nas paścā́t aghám naśat); {277,4} (ā́ ca tvā́m etā́ vṛ́ṣaṇā váhātas, ‥ índras ‥ śṛṇavat ‥); {40,6} (imā́m ca vā́cam pratiháryathā naras, víśvā‿íd vāmā́ vas aśnavat); {934,3} (ā́ ca gáchān, mitrám enā dadhāma); vielleicht auch {26,8}. <div n="P">V. Verbindungen mit den Interrogativen kás <ab>u. s. w.</ab> siehe unter diesen, und céd = ca‿íd siehe besonders. <LEND>
